contacts.name: Sarah Whitman
contacts.title: VP Operations
contacts.relationship: Known her ~4 years. Met at ISSA 2021, traded notes a few times since. Last real conversation was a coffee in Louisville last spring.
contacts.recent_activity: Posted last week about labor turnover hitting 38% and rising overtime costs
contacts.notes: Skeptical of 'AI hype' but practical. Loves tactical wins over platform pitches. Engages most with concrete numbers.

contacts.name: Marcus Reyes
contacts.title: Director of Field Operations
contacts.relationship: Worked together at a previous company 2018-2021. Trusted peer. Texts occasionally about industry stuff.
contacts.recent_activity: Shared a McKinsey report on the skilled trades shortage; commented that dispatch routing is their #1 margin killer
contacts.notes: Engineer background. Wants the math, not the marketing. Will share posts he finds genuinely useful.

contacts.name: Dana Kowalski
contacts.title: COO
contacts.relationship: Connected for 3 years. Speaker at the same NALP panel in 2023; has DM'd compliments on a couple of past posts.
contacts.recent_activity: Hiring posts for an Operations Analyst — third one this quarter
contacts.notes: PE-backed, 18-month value-creation plan. Looking for measurable EBITDA levers. High-signal poster — engaging on her stuff is high-leverage.
